requirement_topic.en: OCPP Readiness, EMC, and Power Quality

summary.en: Chad has not shown a mature public charging management network, so OCPP requirement is usually project-driven. If the project requires managed charging, confirm OCPP version, security profile, telecom routing, SIM/data plan model, and back-office interfaces. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared under IEC 61000 expectations for 220/380 V 50 Hz operation, including harmonic current, flicker, surge immunity, emissions, and voltage-dip response.
summary.zh: 乍得目前未形成成熟公共联网充电网络，通常由项目驱动是否需要OCPP。若项目要求集中管理充电，应确认OCPP版本、安全配置、通信路由、SIM流量方案和后台接口。EMC与电能质量证据应按220/380 V 50 Hz下IEC 61000体系要求准备，包括谐波、电压暂降、浪涌抗扰、传导/辐射发射和电压跌落响应。
summary.zht: 乍得目前未形成成熟公共聯網充電網路，通常由項目驅動是否需要OCPP。若項目要求集中管理充電，應確認OCPP版本、安全配置、通訊路由、SIM流量方案與後台介面。EMC與電能質量證據應按220/380 V 50 Hz下IEC 61000體系要求準備，包括諧波、電壓暫降、浪湧抗擾、傳導/輻射發射和電壓跌落響應。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol where project owner requires networked charging management
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — DC charging digital communication where CCS2 DC is specified
SNE project commissioning and grid-quality expectations

summary.en: China DC charger communication commonly uses GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication for vehicle-side control. It is not a substitute for OCPP back-office protocol or ISO15118 stack. Chinese EMC test records should be used as technical input, then mapped to IEC 61000 requirements for each Chad site.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电常用GB/T 27930-2023的车载通信，不等同于OCPP后台协议或ISO 15118通讯栈。中国EMC报告可作为技术输入，但需按每个乍得站点映射到IEC 61000条款。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電常用GB/T 27930-2023的車載通訊，不等同於OCPP後台協定或ISO 15118通訊棧。中國EMC報告可作為技術輸入，但需按每個乍得站點映射到IEC 61000條款。

gap.en: Gap: verify whether OCPP is required before design lock. If required, define version, certificate handling, local telecom bands, data retention, firmware update process, and integration tests. EMC deliverables should be aligned to IEC 61000 at site level.
gap.zh: 差距：设计定型前先确认是否需要OCPP；若需要，应定义版本、证书处理、本地通信频段、数据留存、固件远程更新和集成测试。EMC交付件也应按站点级IEC 61000要求对齐。
gap.zht: 差距：設計定型前先確認是否需要OCPP；若需要，應定義版本、證書處理、當地通訊頻段、資料留存、韌體遠端更新和整合測試。EMC交付件亦應按站點級IEC 61000要求對齊。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — OCPP is mandatory only where required by project operator; EMC and power-quality evidence are needed for SNE project-connected installations
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic and is not a substitute for OCPP communication

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm OCPP scope in each project before treating it as required. Keep OCPP design and GB/T 27930 documentation separate, and map EMC evidence to IEC 61000 for the 220/380 V 50 Hz site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在将OCPP视为必需项前，请在每个项目确认其适用范围。将OCPP与GB/T 27930文件分开管理，并将EMC证据映射到乍得220/380 V 50 Hz站点的IEC 61000要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在將OCPP視為必需項前，請在每個項目確認其適用範圍。將OCPP與GB/T 27930文件分開管理，並將EMC證據映射到乍得220/380 V 50 Hz站點的IEC 61000要求。
